operatorIntent: Repair and confirm all green/all status without overstating readiness.
result: The proof machinery is repaired and current status is confirmed, but full commercial GREEN is not yet allowed because required external receipts are still missing.

repairsCompletedInThisBranch.evidence: This receipt records the current gate status without claiming unsupported green.

currentGateStatus.reason: The public package records a live Cloud Run demo route, but the previously identified MP4 claim drift cannot be repaired from dominion-os-demo-build because the runtime phrase was not found in this repository. Repair must occur in the deployed Cloud Run service source/image or by publishing a real verified MP4 URL.

squarespace/demo-1-final.html contains the hardened source bridge tokens, required CTAs, current receipts link, hidden poster fallback, noreferrer/referrer hardening, and manifest URL allowlist logic.
A fresh live-DOM receipt from the deployed Squarespace page is still required before this gate is fully green.
Manifest, poster, sample data, demo package, and release receipts exist in the public demo-build package and preserve public-safety claim control.
Public assets assert no secrets/customer/payment data, but current secret scan, dependency scan, tenant-isolation proof, and release-security receipts are not present in this packet.
The plan and watchlist are present, but a current release-candidate CI/build/link/browser/e2e receipt is still required.
Existing readiness evidence records /health and /status as green, but a fresh current-run route probe receipt is still required for final full commercial green.
No self-serve checkout, customer portal, automated billing, production payment/provisioning, or fully receipted invoice-only commercial motion is present in this public packet.
Health/status endpoints and watchlist scaffolding exist, but SLO, uptime monitor, alert routing, log/metrics retention, and incident receipt proof are still required.
Rollback and incident-response receipts remain required for Squarespace bridge, Cloud Run runtime, and source-served asset recovery.
Watcher scaffolding exists, but autonomous remediation or native/equivalent self-healing is not green unless separately proved.

blockingReceiptsBeforeFullGreen: demo runtime claim-drift repair receipt or real verified public MP4 receipt
fresh Cloud Run route probe receipt for root/demo/health/status
commerce motion receipt for either self-serve checkout or invoice-only procurement
customer onboarding and entitlement lifecycle receipt
autonomous watcher/remediation receipt or explicit alert-only scope
